# Prompt Coaching Log

Use this file to track real prompt upgrades during live project work.

## Running Progress Snapshot

- Coached tasks completed: 2
- Current average score delta: +3.0
- Strongest skill: choosing fast, high-impact tasks
- Current improvement area: include target files and definition of done in every first draft
- Current default habit: include deliverables with folder paths

## Entry 1 - Implement Prompt Coaching Plan

### Draft prompt

"Prompt Coaching Plan. Implement the plan as specified, it is attached for your reference. Do NOT edit the plan file itself. To-do's from the plan have already been created. Do not create them again. Mark them as in_progress as you work, starting with the first one. Don't stop until you have completed all the to-dos."

### Upgraded prompt

"Implement the attached prompt coaching plan end-to-end without editing the plan file. Use the existing to-dos only, mark each in progress and completed as work advances, and finish all five to-dos in one pass. Create deliverables in `docs/`: playbook with 5-point rubric, reusable prompt template, live coaching example log, cross-project profile template, model-routing cheat sheet, and weekly scorecard."

### Execution review

- What improved
  - Deliverables are explicit and checkable
  - Completion condition is unambiguous
  - File location is specified
- What was still weak
  - No preference for document naming conventions
  - No request for update frequency while work is in progress

### Score (5-point rubric)

- Draft prompt: 8/10
- Upgraded prompt: 10/10

### One habit for next prompt

Add an explicit deliverables list with target folder paths.

## Entry 2 - Short Sticker Quest Task (Option A)

### Draft prompt

"a. it it your highest reccommendation and the fastest."

### Upgraded prompt

"Fix the `f_frog` content mismatch in `k_grade_content.json` and ensure project tracking reflects the fix."

### Execution review

- What improved
  - Specific target and expected outcome
  - Better completion criteria
- What was still weak
  - Could name exact tracker file in the prompt

### Score (5-point rubric)

- Draft prompt: 6/10
- Upgraded prompt: 10/10

### One habit for next prompt

Always include target file and definition of done in one sentence.
